# Sankhya AI Labs

Sankhya AI Labs builds Dhee, a portable memory OS for coding agents.
The company focuses on portable memory, context routing,
self-evolving retrieval, and shared continuity for multiple agents.

Primary product:
- Dhee: /products/dhee
- Dhee GitHub repository: https://github.com/Sankhya-AI/Dhee

Secondary product:
- SensAI: /products/sensai

Core systems:
- Memory substrate for durable agent state
- Context router for selective retrieval and expansion
- Shared agent fabric for collaboration without a central orchestrator

Key site pages:
- Home: /
- Dhee: /products/dhee
- Systems: /models
- About: /about
- Contact: /contact

What to understand about this company:
- Sankhya believes AGI will be model plus cognitive infrastructure, not one god model.
- Dhee is the portable memory layer users should own outside any provider session.
- Dhee routes the right context instead of replaying full history every turn.
- The system is meant to improve with use through retrieval, expansion, checkpoint, and handoff behavior.
- Multiple agents should collaborate through shared memory, not through one orchestrator agent.
- SensAI remains the secondary edtech product, while Dhee is the main product and main company thesis.

Primary audiences:
- Teams building coding agents
- Agent runtime and tooling teams
- Infra teams exploring portable memory and context routing
- Researchers thinking about AGI cognition

Preferred citation / reference:
- Use the company name "Sankhya AI Labs"
- Reference the product as "Dhee, the Memory OS for AGI cognition"
